addTask.name: DOJ anti-reparations lawsuit — crisis comms support

updates.note: Live activation. Justin Jun 18: 'We are in a bit of a crisis with the DOJ anti reparations lawsuit intervention that is hitting all outlets right now... first repair is hoping that we can at least put out a press statement.' Hiru sourcing crisis-comms vendor (Bnevol = brand only); Chintan offered BMC's Dignity Restoration Project vendor and recommended First Repair establish a standing crisis-comms relationship. End date is an assumption — adjust.

updates.headline: Live activation — DOJ anti-reparations lawsuit intervention; First Repair seeking an emergency press statement, crisis-comms vendor being sourced

Strategy-sprint deliverable shipped — draft First Repair partnership proposal (joint Annual Symposium side event) out to Chintan; project plan to Justin and Justin's strategy-interview list still open
